claim_boundary: External tables are analog-search and follow-up prioritization artifacts; proxy candidates are not direct BDVR activation measurements unless rotation/baryon diagnostics are present.
paper_safe_interpretation: UGC07125 is the direct SPARC low-activation prototype; external datasets define an analog-search ladder rather than direct BDVR activation detections for every object.

prototype.notes: Locked M17 prototype vector for direct and proxy analog searches; UGC07125 is a SPARC low-activation, gas-rich, extended-H I prototype.
